allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Node:', p.get\('engines',{}\).get\('node','N/A'\)\); deps=p.get\('dependencies',{}\); devdeps=p.get\('devDependencies',{}\); print\('NestJS:', deps.get\('@nestjs/core','N/A'\)\); print\('Prisma:', deps.get\('@prisma/client','N/A'\)\); print\('BullMQ:', deps.get\('bullmq','N/A'\)\); print\('OpenTelemetry:', deps.get\('@opentelemetry/sdk-node','N/A'\)\)")
